command_kor: 침실에 움직임이 감지되면 침실 에어컨을 켜줘.
command_eng: When motion is detected in the bedroom, turn on the bedroom air conditioner.
candidates: ["{\"name\":\"BedroomMotionTurnOnAC\",\"cron\":\"\",\"period\":100,\"code\":\"triggered := false\\nif ((#Bedroom #MotionSensor).motionsensor_motion == true) {\\n  if (triggered == false) {\\n    (#Bedroom #AirConditioner).switch_on()\\n    triggered = true\\n  }\\n} else {\\n  triggered = false\\n}\"}"]
